title: Stargate Reborn
body:
This datapack is the implementation of the Stargate universe in Minecraft Vanilla. Discover this magnificent universe through the mythical transport structures

# StarGate :

To transform the structure of simple Minecraft blocks, position yourself on the center of the lowest layer of the structure.
And now, congratulations, you've got a Stargate!

There is a “front/back” direction. It is decided by the different block at the bottom right of the structure. Bear in mind that the shots were taken from the front.

## Blocks

- Milky Way : Redstone lamp, Iron Block, Gold Block
- Pegasus : Redstone lamp, Lapis Block, Gold Block
- Universe : Redstone Lamp, Obsidian, Gold Block
- Tollan : Sea Lantern, Cyan Terracotta, Lapis Block
- Orlin : Netherrack, Polished Granite, Iron Block

# Obtain DHDs & Transport Rings

### Milky Way DHD :
1/9 chance of having one in a chest in a desert temple

### Pegasus DHD :
1/5 chance of having one in a chest in a jungle temple

### Transport Rings :
1/5 chance of having one in a chest in a desert temple

1/3 chance of having one in a chest in a jungle temple

1/4 chance of having one in a chest in a underwater ruin (big & small)
